title: Bablu Dablu
desc: An evil logger decides to turn the forest into his personal lumberyard. However, things change after Bablu and Dablu, two bear brothers, decide to stop him.

title: Yam Hain Hum
desc: Yamraj, the god of death, comes down to Earth to change people's perceptions of him, triggering a series of exciting and comical situations.

title: Jijaji Chhat Per Hain
desc: Pancham and Pintu disguise themselves as a married couple in a desperate attempt to find a house and succeed in renting Murari's attic. However, Murari's daughter, Elaichi, learns about their secret.
